source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for calm English product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese headings, labels, numbers, and compact dashboard text.
layout: Low-profile navigation, broad 8px cards, soft stingray-wing curves, sandy separators, aqua focus states, and shallow underwater shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent stingray motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Stingray transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a stingray silhouette motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A graceful stingray from a top-down three-quarter angle with broad diamond wing shape, sand-grey upper body, charcoal underwing shadow, long thin tail, subtle gill and eye details, aqua reef reflected highlights, and smooth low-profile marine anatomy. It must read as stingray, not manta ray, shark, skate, or abstract kite.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full wings and tail without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no manta ray giant horns, no shark, no aquarium scene, no coral background, no bubbles, no props, no text, no watermark, no second fish.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Stingray light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Stingray", derived from the visible stingray silhouette cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board; use large readable labels, short UI text, and avoid dense tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Stingray, Stingray Silhouette, Palette, Typography, English, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from sand-grey ray skin, reef-sand surfaces, aqua reflected highlights, lagoon teal controls, charcoal underwing shadow, silt textures, and broad winglike curves. The board must read as stingray, not manta ray, shark, or generic beach.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on soft sandy surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: low-profile UX system, precise 8px grid, 8px card radius, soft sand surfaces, ray-grey primary controls, aqua focus rings, lagoon-teal status, wing-curve navigation markers, silt-wash texture, quiet shadows and shallow-depth panels.
Constraints: no manta ray theme, no shark fins, no tropical coral overload, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Stingray", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Stingray dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Stingray". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible stingray silhouette cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board; use large readable labels, short UI text, and avoid dense tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Stingray, Stingray Silhouette, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, English, 日本語 UI, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the same stingray system language as the visible light board: charcoal underwater panels, sand-grey foreground, reef-aqua active states, lagoon-teal success, silt texture, low-profile navigation, broad winglike spacing, and precise shadcn/tweakcn component grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible on dark marine surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: underwing charcoal backgrounds, muted sand text, ray-grey surfaces, aqua focus and charts, lagoon-teal statuses, subtle silt overlays, rounded 8px controls, calm contrast.
Constraints: no manta ray, no shark, no neon aquarium colors, no pure-black-only flat background, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Stingray", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
